input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.13.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.13.4
            TITLE: the endurance score is calculated as:

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.13.4: The Endurance Score is calculated as:
D.12.13.4 The Endurance Score is calculated as:  
Endurance Score = Endurance Time Score + Endurance Laps Score

final_answer: D.12.13.4 The Endurance Score is calculated as: Endurance Score = Endurance Time Score + Endurance Laps Score
